text:
Can we get your Tasting confirmation soon? 

We're excited to invite you to a special tasting experience, the perfect chance to explore our menu and find the best options for your event!

📅 Date: Sunday, May3rd, 2026
📍 Venue: 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420
⏰ Time Slot: 5:30 PM

Sitting is limited, reserve yours now!
a little sneak peak of what a Tasting looks like:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1V2glKcSbQUtDes3Cuk7Q4bFPiazU1NwT/view

Registration link: https://form.jotform.com/260145767354461
USE ANDRE AS CODE
The last tasting we had was a blast, and we can't wait to bring that same energy to our next one.
